api_callout_bold: API access is included on every plan — including Free.
api_callout_rest: Build with AskBiz from day one.
faq_0_a: Yes — cancel in one click, no questions asked. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
faq_1_a: Every time you ask AskBiz something — in chat, the Monitor page, or via API — it counts as one question. Free plan gets 10 per month. Growth and Business are unlimited.
faq_2_q: What is the Command Centre KPI strip?
faq_2_a: Available on all plans, the KPI strip sits at the top of your Monitor overview and shows your live health score, active alert count, 30-day score change, and how many data sources are connected — all at a glance.
faq_3_q: What is the revenue & margin waterfall?
faq_3_a: A small, expandable chart on the Growth and Business overview that breaks down your revenue into COGS, gross profit, operating costs, and net margin — based on your health score signals. Click it to expand with hover detail. Connect accounting data for exact figures.
faq_4_a: A Business-only visual view inside Decision Memory. Every business decision you log appears on a horizontal timeline, colour-coded by outcome: green for good calls, red for missed calls, pulsing gold for decisions due for review. A stats bar shows your overall success rate.
faq_5_a: Six AI-generated board-ready reports: P&L Summary, Cash Runway, Margin Analysis, Board Report, Working Capital, and Cost Structure. Results use percentage-first language and appear inline with a follow-up button. Business plan only.
faq_6_a: A visual Connections tab (available to all plans) showing all 31 supported data sources — e-commerce, accounting, payments, marketing, logistics, and social — with live sync status, a connection health bar, and category filters. Green dot = synced, red = error, grey = not connected.
faq_7_a: On Growth and Business plans, the FX Risk, Landed Cost, and other tools automatically pull your product costs, margins, and supplier data from your connected sources — so you review and calculate rather than entering everything manually.
faq_8_a: Connect TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping, or Pinterest from the Sources page. AskBiz tracks conversion rates, saves (demand signals), and which products are going viral — and alerts you when a product has high saves but no orders.
faq_9_a: AskBiz scans your customer data monthly and scores each customer by churn risk based on days since last order and purchase frequency. At-risk customers appear in a retention priority list, and you can ask AskBiz why any specific customer is flagged.
faq_10_a: Business plan includes up to 5 team members. Each person gets their own login with a role — owner, admin, analyst, accountant, buyer, or viewer.
faq_11_a: Start free — up to 5 staff, no card required. POS seats are {price}/seat/month. Each seat lets one cashier or inventory staff member log in to pos.askbiz.co via email or WhatsApp OTP on their own phone. The owner dashboard is always included free.
faq_12_q: Are prices in my local currency?
faq_12_a_kes: Yes — prices are shown in Kenyan Shillings (KES). You can pay via M-Pesa, Airtel Money, or card through PesaPal.
faq_12_a_gbp: Prices are shown in GBP. At checkout, Stripe automatically converts to your local currency at the current exchange rate.
faq_13_a: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never use your business data to train AI models.
alert_something_wrong_retry: Something went wrong. Please try again.
